name: what-cant-i-press
description: Menu-bar app that audits reserved keyboard shortcuts across the OS and running apps.
author: Eric Bailey

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.build:mac: npm run build && npm run build:helper:mac && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:win: npm run build && npm run build:helper:win && electron-builder --win
